column_key.csv_sha256: SHA256 checksum slot for source CSV payload by day (reused for synthetic fixture payload checksum in this slice).
column_key.first_event_offset_ms: Milliseconds from partition start to first event timestamp.
column_key.last_event_offset_ms: Milliseconds from last event timestamp to partition end.
column_key.quantity_sum: Sum of trade quantity values in partition rows.
column_key.quote_volume_sum: Sum of quote volume values in partition rows.
column_key.row_count: Number of rows in the partition output.
column_key.rows_hash_sha256: SHA256 hash of canonicalized partition rows for deterministic replay matching.
column_key.zip_sha256: SHA256 checksum slot for source ZIP payload by day (reused for synthetic fixture payload checksum in this slice).

source_checksums.source_note: Synthetic Slice-14 pilot fixture payload checksum reused for csv/zip checksum slots (no external zip/csv artifact).
